area_anchor: BRIK draft_refine quality gate parse fail-open
current_truth: draft_refine can return quality.passed=true when quality gate payload parsing fails.
next_scope_now: Harden draft_refine to fail closed on quality gate parse/error paths and add regression tests.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: fill the verification/validation gap via lp-do-ideas -> lp-do-build
why: Attestation must never report a passing quality gate when gate parsing fails, because that can silently approve unsafe or non-compliant customer drafts.

intended_outcome.statement: draft_refine fails closed on malformed/error quality gate responses and regression tests lock that behavior.
